# Jay Hilwig

> Product designer portfolio focused on enterprise UX, AI-adjacent systems, product experiments, and technical fluency.

- [Home](https://jhilwig.com/)

## Key sections

- Work: Amazon Transparency, Aloft Appraisal, IDEO Method Cards
- AI & Experiments: Tabum, Shape of AI, Docuformer, Dissolvr, Applia, Search for GPT
- Technical: tools, systems, platforms, AI prototyping, frontend, data, hosting, design systems, mobile
- CV: career, education, patents
